title: Bomarea torta
taxonomy: Bomarea torta is classified within the family Alstroemeriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the Peruvian lily or Inca lily family. This family is part of the larger order Asparagales, which includes various other plant families such as the asparagus and orchid families. The Alstroemeriaceae family is native to the Americas, and Bomarea torta is specifically found in the Andes mountain range.
